HeroSection.title: Student & Developer
HeroSection.name: Abdulrahman Nahhas
HeroSection.bioLine2: . I balance my academic studies with hands-on projects that challenge me to grow as a programmer and systems engineer dedicated to meaningful solutions.
HeroSection.finalLine: that make a real impact. Beyond coding, I explore new frameworks, contribute to open-source projects, and stay tuned to emerging tech trends.

WorkPage.title: Work Experience
WorkPage.description: A journey through my professional experience — from humanitarian work during crisis response to building digital platforms for justice and education. Each role has strengthened my commitment to using technology as a tool for positive and lasting impact.

navigate.description: Co-founded NAVIGATE, a Syrian consulting company that empowers startups through business strategy, digital tools, and technical development.
responsibilities: Led the company's technical strategy, including web platforms, infrastructure, and internal systems
Collaborated with founders to ensure that technical solutions aligned with long-term business goals and product vision
highlights: Built scalable digital foundations for multiple client startups
Developed internal frameworks for efficient project delivery

newSyriaMovement.description: Joined the New Syria Movement, a Syrian political party focused on social and political reform, contributing to initiatives that support a vision for justice and reconstruction.
responsibilities: Participated in discussions, local meetings, and awareness activities as an active member

promiseForJustice.description: Served as CTO at Promise for Justice & Truth, a human rights organization dedicated to documenting and addressing cases of detainees and the disappeared in Syria.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented secure databases and digital infrastructure for sensitive data
Provided ongoing technical support for research and legal documentation teams
Developed and programmed the organization's website with advanced features, including forms for families of detainees, surveys, databases, and a comprehensive dashboard
highlights: Enhanced operational efficiency through tailored data management tools
Built an integrated platform for managing surveys, records, and reports

thabat.description: Thabat – The Islamic Association for Da'wah, Education, and Culture – is a non-profit organization dedicated to Islamic education, cultural development, and da'wah activities.
responsibilities: Managed and maintained technical systems and digital platforms for the association
Led media production and online presence to support community engagement
Designed and developed the organization's website with a contemporary, clean, and simple design
highlights: Revamped the digital identity of the organization through improved media strategy and platform design

joudVolunteers.description: Volunteered with Joud Volunteers Team during the humanitarian response to the Turkey–Syria earthquake in February 2023.
responsibilities: Supported logistics and coordination of relief operations for earthquake-affected families
highlights: Contributed to community relief initiatives during one of the region’s most critical crises

ProjectsPage.title: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: A collection of projects I've built — each one reflecting creativity, problem-solving, and growth through code and design.

ToolsPage.title: Tools I Use
ToolsPage.description: A curated collection of development tools, IDEs, AI assistants, and platforms that power my workflow.

footer.note: This list is constantly evolving as I discover new tools and technologies.

zed.name: Zed
zed.description: High-performance code editor built for real-time collaboration and speed.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.description: AI-enhanced VS Code fork that deeply understands your codebase for faster development.

git.name: Git
git.description: The backbone of modern development — distributed version control and collaboration.

gitlab.name: GitLab
gitlab.description: Complete DevOps platform with Git hosting, CI/CD pipelines, and project management.

docker.name: Docker
docker.description: Build, ship, and run applications consistently across environments with containers.

geminiCli.name: Gemini CLI
geminiCli.description: Open-source command-line AI assistant with a generous free tier — ideal for coding support.

lmStudio.name: LM Studio
lmStudio.description: Run and experiment with large language models locally on your machine with full control.

affine.name: Affine
affine.description: Open-source Notion alternative — faster, more private, and built for offline-first workflows.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Collaborative interface design platform that redefined modern design workflows.

espIdf.name: ESP-IDF
espIdf.description: Espressif's official framework for ESP32 microcontrollers, from bare-metal to IoT solutions.

kicad.name: KiCad
kicad.description: Open-source suite for PCB design — from schematics to manufacturing-ready layouts.

postgresql.name: PostgreSQL
postgresql.description: The world's most advanced open-source relational database with robust features and extensibility.

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.description: Frontend cloud platform for seamless deployments, edge functions, and Next.js integration.

cloudflare.name: Cloudflare
cloudflare.description: DNS, CDN, registrar, and Zero Trust security — DNSSEC, DDoS protection, privacy-first resolver, and more.

yaak.name: Yaak
yaak.description: Local-first, Git-friendly API client for REST, GraphQL, WebSockets, SSE, and gRPC — fast, private, and extensible.

orion.name: Orion
orion.description: Privacy-first WebKit browser by Kagi — zero telemetry, built-in ad/tracker blocking, and advanced privacy controls.
